title: Arrabidaea platyphylla
taxonomy: Arrabidaea platyphylla is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. This family is a part of the order Lamiales and class Magnoliopsida. Arrabidaea platyphylla is further classified into the family Bignoniaceae, tribe Tecomeae, and genus Arrabidaea. The Bignoniaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.
uses: Arrabidaea platyphylla is used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world. Its leaves and stems are known to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Arrabidaea platyphylla for medicinal purposes.
